description_long: This sculpture depicts a stylized humanoid bust with features reminiscent of tree bark and wood grain, giving it an organic, arboreal appearance. The head is elongated and textured with vertical grooves, resembling the top of a tree trunk, and the facial features are deeply set, with pronounced cheekbones and a stern expression. The surface is mottled with shades of brown and gray, enhancing the wood-like effect. The shoulders are broad and blend smoothly into the base, which is rounded and solid. The back of the head is irregular and knobby, further emphasizing the natural, tree-inspired motif. The overall form is robust and monolithic, suggesting a sculpture carved from a single piece of material.
description: A stylized humanoid bust with tree bark textures and an elongated, wood-like head, featuring deep grooves and a stern expression.
description_view_0: Front view shows the stern face, elongated head, and detailed bark-like textures.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the deep grooves, pronounced cheekbones, and the organic flow of the head into the shoulders.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the irregular, knobby top and the smooth transition from head to base, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right rear angle emphasizes the uneven, tree trunk-like crown and the organic curvature of the bust.
attribute_subject_matter: stylized humanoid bust with tree-like features
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is plain and does not indicate a specific setting.
